name: peas-engine
description: Auditable deterministic event-processing and replay engine

scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test dist/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=90 --test-coverage-branches=80 --test-coverage-functions=95 --test-coverage-include=dist/src/**/*.js --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=./scripts/audit-test-reporter.mjs --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=audit-test-results.json dist/test/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:scale: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test dist/test/persistence-scale.test.js
scripts.check: npm run verify:runtime && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:mutation
